clues: Some users on the office network are randomly losing internet connectivity for a few minutes at a time.
When connectivity is lost, affected devices show an unexpected IP address in a different subnet.
Users in one specific area of the building are affected; users in other areas are not.
IT installed a new VoIP phone system last week that includes integrated network switches.
The new VoIP phones have built-in DHCP servers that are conflicting with the corporate DHCP server.
